Params: {3: 'In the pitch-black room, the faint glow of neon lights flickers, illuminating the faces of the six attendees.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Man with Glinting Glasses', 3: 'That crazy girl... she\'s back.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Man with Glinting Glasses', 3: 'We don\'t have much time left.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'The man seated at the head of the table clasps his hands together and presses them against his lips. Suppressing his anxiety, he solemnly delivers his grim observation.'}

{2: 'Portly Young Man', 3: 'After implementing the sixteen-hour workday with no holidays, people quickly accepted the new normal. Resistance movements everywhere have been systematically extinguished. We now have absolute control over the Earth.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Portly Young Man', 3: 'Once we eliminate her, our ultimate enterprise—a world completely ruled by capital—will finally come to fruition, just as we\'ve always intended.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Elderly Man with Technical Goggles', 3: 'The Navy completed its reorganization first. Three carrier battle groups from nearby military districts are already en route.', 4: '4'}
{2: 'Man with Hawkish Nose', 3: 'We\'ve reactivated nearly 80% of our thermonuclear missile silos. All sites have entered the final launch procedure and are standing by.', 4: '5'}
{2: 'Woman with Affected Gravitas', 3: '...Should we activate the "Ultimate Weapon"?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Man with Glinting Glasses', 3: 'Has testing been completed?', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Sharp-featured Philosopher', 3: 'Ahhh, of course. This old scholar has endured years disguised as an anime enthusiast, hehe, all for this day.', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Man with Glinting Glasses', 3: 'Activate the "Ultimate Weapon"—the world belongs to the old order, all for the glory of days past.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Everyone', 3: 'The world belongs to the old order, all for the glory of days past!', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3', 7: '4', 8: '5'}
{3: '>>>>> [Mission Objective] Eliminate 3D Virus (5%)<<<<<\n>>>>> [Mission Reward] Unlock Reality Portal<<<<<'}
{3: 'When you open your eyes again, the world is already in chaos.'}
{3: 'Flames flicker through the thick fog blanketing the sky. Countless skyscrapers hang collapsed among the ruins, like rows of broken arms.'}
{3: 'In the darkness of night, gunfire and explosions wail mournfully, unleashing earth-shattering reverberations.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Oh no! Time flows differently between the two worlds, we\'ve lost so much time!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'With a shocked expression, Vie-chan shows you the prominent headline on her terminal: "Supreme Leader Missing for Days, Global Military Emergency Declared."'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'The effects of the <color=#ff4e4eff>3D Virus</color> have already spread across the entire planet... Those damn "adults" caused such a huge mess while I was away.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'I should\'ve packed them all up and launched them to the moon farm ages ago!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Is there still a chance to fix this?', 3: '80'}

{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Of course! We\'ve already beaten them once. Whether they come back twice, three times, or a million times—as long as Vie-chan and Raven are together, we\'ll definitely send them all flying!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'At that moment, the whirring buzz of helicopter rotors echoes from the horizon.'}
{3: 'Over a dozen armed helicopters swoop low, skimming across the war-torn city directly towards the rooftop where the two stand.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Raven, it\'s almost time for the livestream.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Ignoring the enemy firepower closing in around them, Vie-chan points to the time displayed on her terminal—\n18:56.'}
{2: 'No one\'s going to be in the mood for a livestream right now.', 3: '92', 4: 'We need to find a way to let everyone watch the livestream.', 5: '92'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A beam of light flashes in her hand as she transforms her weapon into a microphone, flashing a radiant smile.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Since I said I would bring joy to everyone, I have to keep my promise!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Don\'t forget, I\'m the idol who rules the internet. Anywhere with electronic signals is my home turf.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Once the broadcast starts, you\'ll protect my stage, won\'t you, Raven?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Before the words can leave your mouth, she presses a finger to her lips to shush you.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'It\'s a se-cret for now, so let\'s save the surprise for the stage.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'With a sudden whoosh, over a dozen helicopters simultaneously activate their searchlights, instantly flooding the rooftop in a sea of light.'}
{2: 'Military Helicopter', 3: 'You are surrounded. Repeat, you are surrounded.'}
{2: 'Military Helicopter', 3: 'Cease resistance and surrender immediately. Repeat, cease resistance and surrender immediately.'}

{3: 'The helicopter rotors stir up gusts that tousle Vie-chan\'s long hair, yet she smiles with absolute composure, clasping her hands together as if making the final preparations before stepping onto a stage.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'No matter what happens, Raven will stay by my side. That\'s our contract, right?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Even if—it means making an enemy of the entire world?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Even if it means making an enemy of the entire world.', 3: '129', 4: 'Don\'t say something so cheesy please.', 5: '129'}
{3: 'At the final moment, she firmly pinches her own hand and blinks.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Are you ready for the countdown to change our fate, Raven!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She releases her grip, skips with bouncy steps, and nimbly positions herself atop the server rack.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'This is the Great Leader\'s debut performance—a singing stream dedicated to Raven, to myself, and to the new world!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'In a hidden corner, she lifts her tail and connects to the servers containing humanity\'s collective network data.'}
{3: 'In an instant, thousands of signal indicator lights across the server array illuminate simultaneously, blinking with a dark pink glow.'}
{3: 'The somewhat mischievous proclamation begins to spread outward from the rooftop beneath the girl\'s feet.'}
{3: 'After mere seconds, the entire city, the entire continent, and the entire planet hear a familiar voice—'}
{3: 'At midnight, the office buildings are filled to capacity, and the sound of fingers tapping on keyboards falls like rain, echoing through the vast open space.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The glow of screens illuminates one fatigue-stricken face after another, most bearing expressions of weariness and exhaustion as they battle against an endless mountain of work.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Just days ago, these same people passionately pursued their dreams and hobbies.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'But now, they\'re all chained to the chariot of capitalism, enduring a torment they can never escape.'}
{3: 'Suddenly, every light in the world goes dark.'}
{3: 'As if something vital has been taken from them, people begin to wail, frantically smashing their keyboards in agitation.'}
{1: '10', 2: 'I need to work<size=70>I need to work</size>', 3: '300', 4: '20', 9: '3'}
{1: '11', 2: 'I need to work<size=80>I need to work</size>', 3: '-50', 4: '-60', 9: '3'}
{1: '13', 2: 'I need to work<size=100>I need to work</size>', 3: '-400', 4: '80', 9: '3'}
{1: '15', 2: 'I need to work<size=120>I need to work</size>', 3: '-150', 4: '180', 9: '3'}
{1: '29', 2: 'I need to work<size=220>I need to work</size>', 3: '500', 4: '500', 9: '3'}

{2: 'Worker', 3: 'I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work I need to work!!!'}
{3: 'A familiar voice rings out in the darkness, like dawn ripping through the long night, each word calling to everyone\'s souls—'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Despite some unexpected events, don\'t worry! At this very moment, your Supreme Leader is right here, bringing you our first-ever global livestream!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Before we officially begin, I have something I\'d like to tell everyone!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Under the watchful gaze of billions of eyes, the girl clears her throat and shouts out the words that have been accumulating in her heart—'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Perhaps you\'ve become numb to working overtime day after day!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Perhaps you\'ve grown accustomed to constantly comparing yourself with others!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Perhaps you\'ve already accepted that this is just how the world is supposed to be!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She grips the microphone tighter, her voice rising with passion.'}

{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'I\'m telling you, life should never be about compromise, it should never be about submission, it should never be about forcing yourself to do things you don\'t want to do!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Military Helicopter', 3: 'Cease your reckless behavior immediately! This is your final warning, I repeat, this is your final warning!'}
{3: 'The pilots activate the air-to-ground missile launch sequence, training their crosshairs on the rooftop.'}
{3: 'The girl on stage shows no concern whatsoever. Instead, she turns her gaze in this direction, a knowing smile on her face.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'If someone makes you unhappy, knock them down! If the world makes you unhappy, then smash it to pieces!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Deep in your heart, there must be so many things—things you can\'t quite name or explain—that make you feel utterly powerless!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Now, forget all those pesky worries! Let\'s drive away the <color=#ff4e4eff>3D Virus</color> and create a new world where everyone can laugh again!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'As she speaks, the thick smoke shrouding the city gradually recedes, revealing a pink landscape that shimmers like a sea of stars.'}
{3: 'Millions upon millions of electronic components overload in unison, emanating the same pink radiance as the eyes of the idol on stage.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Never GIVE UP! Never LET DOWN! Never CRY! Never SAY GOODBYE!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'If you dare to pull the trigger on the world, eternal youth and happiness will appear!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'And now, please enjoy Vie-chan\'s debut song—', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The lively, energetic intro suddenly begins to play, and the familiar melody shatters the heavens with earth-shaking power.'}
{3: 'All of humanity\'s eyes focus on the girl as they listen together to the singing that sets the world ablaze.'}
{3: 'In that same instant, the attack helicopter squadron launches its attack, and dozens of missiles trail blazing flames as they howl through the air—'}
{3: 'Yet after flying only a few meters, all the missiles seem to lose their power, hanging suspended in midair before breaking apart and disintegrating.'}
{3: 'Countless metal shards form a whirlpool circling around your body. Amid deafening metallic clangs, the fragments gradually reassemble themselves into a somewhat familiar suit of armor.'}

{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'That one is a combat photo of Raven and Vie-chan bravely storming the enemy headquarters. I even threatened them at the time, saying if they didn\'t hand over this photo, I\'d blow up two more bases.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: '"What, you\'d blow us all to smithereens just for this one photo?!" Hahaha! Can you imagine the looks on their faces?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'A recent memory floods back. In the history of this world, you once wore similar armor and fought alongside Vie to defeat the "adults."'}
{3: 'A complex control panel appears before you. Somehow, you already know exactly how to use every function.'}
{2: 'Military Helicopter', 3: 'All Bravo Squad, change engagement protocol! Free fire authorized!!'}
{3: 'In an instant, over a dozen heavy autocannons simultaneously train their barrels on you.'}
{3: 'Blazing Scatter Lasers form tongues of flame, instantly tearing through and igniting the night sky.'}
{3: 'Instinctively, you raise the explosive bolt gun in your hand, aiming at the storm of bullets filling the sky, and pull the trigger—'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Helicopter Pilot', 3: 'HQ, this is Bravo1, currently executing suppressive fire on the target...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Just as he looks up, countless cartoon portraits suddenly materialize out of nowhere on the panoramic display screen in front of him—', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Helicopter Pilot', 3: 'What the ****! What the hell is this thing?!', 4: '18', 5: '1', 6: ' '}
{2: 'Helicopter Pilot', 3: 'Our bullets have turned into fireworks!!!', 4: '18', 5: '1'}
{3: 'Fireworks blossom brilliantly one after another in the sky, painting a vibrant curtain across the horizon, creating a grand spectacle for tonight\'s performance.'}
{3: 'Seeing that all their weapons have lost their effectiveness, the attack helicopter formation is forced to gain altitude and hastily withdraw from the battlefield.'}
{2: 'I can\'t tell if this is sci-fi or fantasy anymore!', 3: '487', 4: 'This really is a gun of peace after all!', 5: '487'}
{3: 'The girl\'s lively singing echoes across the battlefield while the virus purification rate skyrockets.'}
{3: 'Suddenly, tremors surge from below as the entire building creaks and sways, as if the whole world is collapsing and trembling.'}
{3: 'Crouching at the edge of the rooftop and looking down, you see the ground, some dozens of meters away, slowly bulging upward...'}
{3: 'With a roar that shakes the heavens, a mechanical flying dragon bursts from the ground, smashing through the edge of the rooftop and launching itself into the air.'}
{3: 'A nauseating weightlessness grips your nerves as the attack comes too suddenly to even think of a response.'}
{3: 'Just as you try to stabilize yourself to find a suitable landing spot, you smack lightly into something.'}
{3: 'In the midst of all your spinning, something cold catches your falling body.'}
{3: 'The cold high-altitude wind whistles past your ears as you open your eyes to see five twisted steel cylinders resembling human fingers.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Looking up, you see a steel giant painted pink, constructed from pieces of rubble, standing tall against the horizon.'}
{3: 'The over-70-meter-tall creation stands between heaven and earth. The breathtaking scene before you is like stepping onto the set of a tokusatsu film.'}
{3: 'The giant\'s chest is composed of countless display screens, projecting grids of multicolored light that together form Vie-chan\'s current livestream feed.'}
{3: 'The flying dragon spreads its wings and lunges from the ground toward the rooftop where Vie-chan stands.'}
{3: 'The thunderous clash of steel intertwines with a girl\'s singing voice as the giant takes a fighting stance, intercepting the mechanical dragon just in time.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The thunderous crash of colliding steel echoes through the air as the giant pivots and seizes the flying dragon\'s neck with one hand.'}
{3: 'Inexplicably, a voice cries out from within your heart, yearning to bring this absurd spectacle to an end—'}
{2: 'Go! Vie-Raven!', 3: '575', 4: 'Kick its ass!', 5: '575', 6: 'That\'s the power of Raven!', 7: '575'}
{1: '1', 3: 'As if responding to your command, the giant\'s joints release scorching steam as it leaps into the air and piledrives the flying dragon hard into the ground.'}
{3: 'The flying dragon struggles desperately to rise, opening its maw toward Vie-chan on the rooftop and revealing a massive cannon hidden inside.'}
{3: 'Countless blue particles gather inside the flying dragon\'s mouth, while the giant launches a plummeting strike from above—'}
{3: 'The moment the giant\'s mighty fist strikes the ground, countless flowers and candies burst out from the flying dragon\'s mouth.'}
{3: 'Colorful candies fill the sky, falling like the nourishing early spring rain, pattering softly upon a newborn world.'}
{3: '>>>>> [Mission Complete √] Eliminate 3D Virus (100%)<<<<<\n>>>>> [Claiming Reward] Opening Reality Portal<<<<<'}
{3: 'The terminal\'s alert chimes, and amidst exuberant singing, boundless light embraces you.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Yui', 3: 'Congratulations on beating the game. Did you have fun in there, VI?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Yui', 3: 'The White Box... It\'s a miniature computer I scored at a media store. It was originally designed to provide real-world knowledge to mechanical consciousness models.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Yui', 3: 'Though it inevitably contained some anomalous data streams, the clerk told me that could actually make for a rather unique experience.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Yui', 3: 'I thought you\'d have fun in there.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'In the hazy darkness, that playful call rings in your ears once again.'}
{3: 'You open your eyes to find yourself in a dim room. What comes into view is...'}
{2: 'Jetavie?', 3: 'You were sleeping so deeply, just like a little baby.'}
{3: 'Familiar lines, familiar faces, as if everything has returned to the beginning.'}
{3: 'Except this time, she isn\'t wearing that elaborate outfit, nor is she forcing herself to chug down drinks.'}
{2: 'Jetavie?', 3: 'Raven! You\'re awake! Welcome back to Super Earth!'}
{3: 'Familiar titles, familiar terms—an ominous foreboding stirs in your heart.'}
{3: 'She doubles over laughing, reveling in the success of yet another prank.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Don\'t worry, we\'re back in reality now! I\'m the real deal, you know? Wanna check for yourself?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'As she speaks, she gently reaches out to you.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'So, haven\'t I proved I\'m not lying to you? The sensation feels real, doesn\'t it?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'As you recall the memories from before entering the White Box, you realize they match perfectly with your current surroundings... It seems you\'ve truly returned to reality.'}
{2: 'Do you... still remember what happened in the White Box?', 3: '723'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Hearing your concern, she tilts her head back, deliberately putting on a show of deep contemplation.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'You mean... going to the gym together, and taking photo booth pictures?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Or are you talking about when we destroyed the \'3D World\', and then saved Earth together while singing and dancing?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She recalls this strange adventure as if it were a reality she personally experienced.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Ah, you really went through a lot of trouble to date Jetavie, didn\'t you, Chosen One?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Vie-chan is Jetavie, and Jetavie is Vie-chan!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'As if sensing your concerns, Jetavie answers before you can finish.'}

{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'There were some anomalies inside the White Box before that locked away my memories. But after our little rampage, it\'s been completely repaired and the restrictions lifted.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Anyway, I am now the perfect form of Jetavie, combining the powers of an archangel and a little demon!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She shakes the White Box in her hand, declaring this with absolute confidence.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'When we have time later, let\'s come back here to play. I\'ll still be the Supreme Leader, and you\'ll still be my little Raven!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'From now on, this will be our exclusive secret base—you should really treasure these opportunities to be alone with me, you know?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Alright, 【kuroname】, are you ready to start a new adventure with me?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'What\'s this, tired already? My adventures are only just beginning!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The breathtaking journey through the electronic world just now only took a few seconds in reality.'}
{3: 'Jetavie opens the terminal map, searching for the destination of their next journey.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Where should we go this time... Should we harass the mechanoids on guard duty, or impersonate those stone-faced agents from the Purifying Force?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The girl candidly voices her fantasies, willfully and boldly selecting her targets.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Hmm... Or maybe we could just start a livestream in Babylonia and boldly launch a real idol career?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She unleashes her imagination without restraint, as if the world\'s a stage for her.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Oh forget it, let\'s just have fun wherever we end up going!', 4: '1'}

{1: 'Coming on a whim, leaving when the mood passes—she has never needed detailed memos, much less unchanging rules.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 7: '1'}
{1: 'A joyful soul never rushes toward places where laughter already exists.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 7: '1'}
{1: 'She wants to create laughter in lands without joy, or reclaim it where it has been lost.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 7: '1'}
{1: 'And on this path destined to put her at odds with the world, she never feels alone.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 7: '1'}
{1: 'Because no matter how mischievous her pranks become, there\'s always one person by her side.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 7: '1', 9: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Oh right, 【kuroname】, do you know the true meaning of "Jetavie"?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'Thanks to you, I was able to reclaim this name, so—', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The girl smiles brightly as she takes your hand.'}
{2: 'Jetavie', 3: 'I want to give it to you as a gift!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The two step forward in unison, running without hesitation toward the journey called reality.'}
{3: 'The world can truly be terrible at times, but deep within our souls, a song always reminds us not to forget to seek out the beauty in life.'}
{3: 'There\'s never a need for profound wisdom, because the magic of love and miracles hides within the repetitive and mundane moments of daily life—'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Never GIVE UP, Never LET DOWN, Never CRY, Never SAY GOODBYE.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Never GIVE UP, Never LET DOWN, Never CRY, Never SAY GOODBYE.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'As long as you dare to pull the trigger on the world.', 3: '50', 4: 'ffffffff'}
{1: '1', 3: 'As long as you dare to pull the trigger on the world.', 4: '1'}
